text.title: VUI Testing Best Practices Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying vui-testing-best-practices; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Test fixtures use the same TTS vendor as the product; naturalness scores inflate by 0.5-1.0 points.
antipattern.root-cause: Familiar prosody patterns rated as more natural by LLM judge.
antipattern.fix: Use a different TTS engine for fixtures than the product TTS.

antipattern.symptom: Naturalness scores correlate suspiciously with correctness; bias inflates correct responses.
antipattern.fix: Score naturalness blind; compute correctness in a separate pass.

antipattern.symptom: Suite reports all-pass but provider returned 429 rate limits silently treated as empty results.
antipattern.fix: Cap concurrency at provider rate limit; treat any 429 as test failure not skip.

antipattern.symptom: Raw participant audio sent to cloud LLM judge — PII + bystander voices exposed.
antipattern.fix: Transcribe locally; redact PII; send only text to LLM judge.
